parameters.jsCode: const crypto=require('crypto');const i=$json,p=i.payload||{};if(!i.project_id||!p.novel_id)throw new Error('INVALID_INPUT: project_id and payload.novel_id are required');const action=i.action||'run',v=Number(i.generation_version||1),key=p.idempotency_key||[i.project_id,'chunk_analysis',p.novel_id,v,action].join(':');return [{json:{...i,stage:'chunk_analysis',action,generation_version:v,trace_id:i.trace_id||`trace_${crypto.randomUUID()}`,task_id:`task_${crypto.randomUUID()}`,idempotency_key:key,payload:p,started_ms:Date.now()}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO drama.workflow_tasks(task_id,trace_id,project_id,workflow_stage,action,entity_type,entity_id,generation_version,idempotency_key,status,max_retries,input_data,started_at) VALUES($1,$2,$3,'chunk_analysis',$4,'novel',$5,$6,$7,'running',$8,$9::jsonb,now()) ON CONFLICT(idempotency_key) DO UPDATE SET status=CASE WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4 IN ('retry','regenerate','resume') AND drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count<drama.workflow_tasks.max_retries THEN 'running' ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.status END,retry_count=CASE WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4 IN ('retry','regenerate','resume') THEN drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count+1 ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count END RETURNING status,output_data,$10::jsonb AS request;
SELECT c.chapter_id,c.chapter_number,c.title,c.content,c.char_count FROM drama.novel_chapters c WHERE c.project_id=$1 AND c.novel_id=$2 ORDER BY c.chapter_number;

INSERT INTO drama.novel_chunks(chunk_id,project_id,novel_id,chapter_ids,chunk_index,content,char_count,previous_summary) VALUES($1,$2,$3,$4::jsonb,$5,$6,$7,$8) ON CONFLICT(novel_id,chunk_index) DO UPDATE SET chapter_ids=excluded.chapter_ids,content=excluded.content,char_count=excluded.char_count,previous_summary=excluded.previous_summary,updated_at=now() WHERE drama.novel_chunks.analysis_status<>'completed' RETURNING chunk_id;

SELECT chunk_id,project_id,novel_id,chunk_index,content,char_count,previous_summary,retry_count FROM drama.novel_chunks WHERE project_id=$1 AND novel_id=$2 AND (analysis_status='pending' OR (analysis_status='failed' AND $3 IN ('retry','regenerate','resume') AND retry_count<$4)) ORDER BY chunk_index;

parameters.jsCode: const c=$json;const title=String(c.content).split('\n')[0].slice(0,60);return [{json:{...c,analysis:{summary:`分段 ${c.chunk_index}：${title}相关情节推进。`,characters:[{name:'示例人物',aliases:[],gender:'unknown',estimated_age:null,identity:'故事人物',appearance:[],personality:['目标明确'],relationships:[],evidence:[{chunk_id:c.chunk_id,quote:title}]}],locations:[],events:[{event_id:`evt_${c.chunk_index}_1`,description:title,participants:['示例人物'],location:'',time_hint:'',importance:3,evidence:[{chunk_id:c.chunk_id,quote:title}]}],conflicts:[],world_rules:[],timeline_clues:[],foreshadowing:[]},raw_response:{mock:true},usage:{prompt_tokens:0,completion_tokens:0,total_tokens:0},estimated_cost:0}}];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {model:$env.TEXT_ANALYSIS_MODEL||'glm-5.2',temperature:0.1,max_tokens:Number($env.MODEL_MAX_TOKENS||4096),response_format:{type:'json_object'},messages:[{role:'system',content:'你是小说结构分析器。只输出严格 JSON，字段必须为 summary, characters, locations, events, conflicts, world_rules, timeline_clues, foreshadowing。characters 与 events 必须符合给定数据结构，所有结论保留 evidence。'},{role:'user',content:'previous_summary: '+$json.previous_summary+'
chunk_id: '+$json.chunk_id+'
正文：
'+$json.content}]} }}

parameters.jsCode: const c=$('Loop Over Chunks').item.json;let raw=$json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content;if(typeof raw!=='string')throw new Error('INVALID_AI_RESPONSE: missing content');raw=raw.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i,'').replace(/```$/,'').replace(/,\s*([}\]])/g,'$1').trim();const a=JSON.parse(raw);for(const k of ['summary','characters','locations','events','conflicts','world_rules','timeline_clues','foreshadowing'])if(!(k in a))throw new Error(`INVALID_AI_SCHEMA: missing ${k}`);if(typeof a.summary!=='string'||!Array.isArray(a.characters)||!Array.isArray(a.events))throw new Error('INVALID_AI_SCHEMA: wrong field types');return [{json:{...c,analysis:a,raw_response:{id:$json.id,model:$json.model,finish_reason:$json.choices?.[0]?.finish_reason},usage:$json.usage||{},estimated_cost:0}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ {model:$env.TEXT_ANALYSIS_MODEL||'glm-5.2',temperature:0,max_tokens:Number($env.MODEL_MAX_TOKENS||4096),response_format:{type:'json_object'},messages:[{role:'system',content:'修复输入，使其成为严格合法 JSON。只输出 JSON，不增删语义。'},{role:'user',content:String($('Call LiteLLM').item.json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content||'')}]} }}

parameters.jsCode: const c=$('Loop Over Chunks').item.json;const raw=$json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content;const a=JSON.parse(String(raw).replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i,'').replace(/```$/,'').trim());for(const k of ['summary','characters','locations','events','conflicts','world_rules','timeline_clues','foreshadowing'])if(!(k in a))throw new Error(`INVALID_AI_SCHEMA: missing ${k}`);return [{json:{...c,analysis:a,raw_response:{repaired:true,id:$json.id},usage:$json.usage||{},estimated_cost:0}}];

parameters.query: UPDATE drama.novel_chunks SET analysis_status='completed',analysis_result=$1::jsonb,raw_response=$2::jsonb,token_usage=$3::jsonb,estimated_cost=$4,error_message=NULL,updated_at=now() WHERE chunk_id=$5 RETURNING chunk_id;

parameters.jsCode: const c=$('Loop Over Chunks').item.json;const msg=$json.error?.message||$json.message||'chunk analysis failed';return [{json:{chunk_id:c.chunk_id,error_message:msg}}];

parameters.query: UPDATE drama.novel_chunks SET analysis_status='failed',retry_count=retry_count+1,error_message=$1,updated_at=now() WHERE chunk_id=$2 RETURNING chunk_id;

SELECT count(*)::int AS total_count,count(*) FILTER(WHERE analysis_status='completed')::int AS success_count,count(*) FILTER(WHERE analysis_status='failed')::int AS failed_count,coalesce(sum((token_usage->>'total_tokens')::int),0)::int AS output_tokens,coalesce(sum(estimated_cost),0)::numeric AS estimated_cost FROM drama.novel_chunks WHERE project_id=$1 AND novel_id=$2;

UPDATE drama.workflow_tasks SET status=$1,output_data=$2::jsonb,error_code=CASE WHEN $1='failed' THEN 'CHUNK_ANALYSIS_INCOMPLETE' ELSE NULL END,error_message=CASE WHEN $1='failed' THEN $3 ELSE NULL END,completed_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$4; SELECT $2::jsonb AS response;
